name: 415-unsupported-media-type
title: 415 Unsupported Media Type — unsupported query media type
description: The request declares a Content-Type the resource does not accept as a query media type. Per the D2 taxonomy this is a 415; the response advertises the accepted query media types via Accept-Query so the client can retry (§4.4, §4.5, §4.6).

$errors.message: Content-Type 'text/plain' is not an accepted query media type. See Accept-Query.
